'''Parq Yewgeen Plancke''' was the manager of the [[Imperial Galactic Bank/Legends|Imperial Bank]] when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] came to close his "[[Jenos Idanian]]" account.

Plancke calmly told Solo that the account had been frozen by [[Hal Horn]] of [[Corellian Security Force|Corsec]] and that he was to wait for his imminent arrest. Solo took Plancke hostage in order to escape. Plancke died when [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] opened fire on the fleeing Solo.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
